jobs.name: Nightly session cleanup
jobs.description: Clean up idle subagents (3+ hours) and direct sessions (1+ day)

payload.message: Run session cleanup: openclaw sessions cleanup --enforce

Check the Ubiquiti Travel Router availability:

1. Run: curl -s 'https://store.ui.com/us/en/category/wifi-special-devices/products/utr' > /tmp/utr_page.html
2. Check the output for availability status:
   - If 'Sold Out' is found in the page: product is SOLD OUT
   - If 'Add to Cart' is found in the page: product is AVAILABLE
   - If NEITHER string is found: the curl command may have failed; wait 5 minutes, try the curl again and check again
3. Read current state from /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/utr_state.json
4. Compare current availability to last known status
5. If status changed (available → sold out, or vice versa):
   - Send Telegram alert to chat ID 8623402151 using TELEGRAM_TOKEN env var
   - If available: '🚨 *Ubiquiti Travel Router is AVAILABLE!* Check it out: https://store.ui.com/us/en/category/wifi-special-devices/products/utr'
   - If sold out: '❌ Ubiquiti Travel Router is now SOLD OUT'
   - Update state file with new status and timestamp
6. If status hasn't changed, just update the timestamp and exit silently

State file format:
{
  "last_status": "available" or "sold_out",
  "last_checked": "ISO timestamp"
}

jobs.name: cleanup-old-subagent-sessions
jobs.description: Delete subagent tasks and sessions older than 3 hours with succeeded status

payload.message:
Run this command to clean up old subagent sessions:

bash /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/cleanup-old-subagents.sh

Then report back with the output and any errors.

jobs.name: sync-openclaw-config-hourly
jobs.description: Commit and push openclaw config changes to GitHub every hour

payload.message:
Run the openclaw config sync script:

bash /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/sync-openclaw-config.sh

Report the output.

jobs.name: Airplane Live Tour Monitor
jobs.description: Check airplanelivetour.com hourly for new tour dates/cities

payload.message:
Run the airplane tour monitor:

python3 /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/check-airplane-tour.py

The script handles all output and Telegram notifications directly. Do not report anything.
